'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 1''' was the 1st issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[April]] and [[May]] [[1996]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Star Sightings|New Hopes]]
*Q&A
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Debbie Lee Carrington|Deborah Lee Carrington]]
*:<small>The first of our regular interviews with the Star Wars trilogy's unsung heroes finds us catching up with an Ewok!</small>

===Features===
*"[[They Call Him the Sith Lord]]"
*:<small>''The full low-down on [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], including interviews with [[David Prowse|Dave Prowse]], [[James Earl Jones]], [[Brock Peters]] and [[Sebastian Shaw]], who have all had a hand in bringing the character to life.</small>
*"[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]"
*:<small>Introducing our major regular feature on the making of a legend.</small>
*Interview: [[Rick McCallum]]
*:<small>The Executive Producer of the new Star Wars trilogy brings you up to date on developments.</small>
*"[[Head Hunter: An Interview with Jeremy Bulloch|Interview: Jeremy Bulloch]]"
*:<small>Step out with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] himself, a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] without equal!</small>
*''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]'' Part 1
*:<small>Part one of a three-part new comic strip story from [[Dark Horse Comics]]. Boba Fett is hired by a love-struck [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]! Story by [[John Wagner]] with art by [[Cam Kennedy]].</small>
